prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A large checklist on a clipboard. Four items are listed, each representing a union variant: "circle" (checked, green), "square" (checked, green), "triangle" (checked, green). At the bottom, a special red box labeled "assertNever" acts as a safety net with the text "should never reach here". A second version of the checklist to the right shows a new fifth variant "pentagon" that is unchecked with a red X and a compiler error speech bubble saying "not assignable to never". A small guard character at the bottom holds a "no escapees" sign.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
